steps.title: Separate complete clauses
steps.content: The text before the blank forms a complete sentence about Amy McGovern's work. The words after the blank begin another complete sentence explaining supervised machine learning.

steps.title: Use a period between sentences
steps.content: A runs the two clauses together with no punctuation. B creates a comma splice. D creates an illogical relative-clause fragment. A period after learning and a capitalized Supervised correctly separate the two sentences. The answer is C.
